summary:
Claim: Dexamethasone is the only agent listed that cannot decrease intraocular pressure in glaucoma.  
Evidence: - Dexamethasone increases aqueous humor production by activating glucocorticoid receptors in the ciliary body, thereby raising IOP. - Clonidine reduces IOP via central α₂-adrenergic receptor stimulation, decreasing sympathetic tone and aqueous humor synthesis.  
Answer: D
